title: cerasiocarpum zeylanicum
intro: Cerasiocarpum zeylanicum, also known as Ceylon myrrh, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cerasiocarpum zeylanicum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Cerasiocarpum zeylanicum can be found in the form of decoctions, infusions, and topical creams, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies.
